expositionText: My family's heirloom was stolen weeks ago. I've heard it ended up somewhere {location_hint}, locked away underground.
acceptText: Find the heirloom. It should be in a chest somewhere in the caves {location_hint}. Bring it back to me.
declineText: I see. Another person who can't be bothered. I'll find it myself.
skillcheckPassText: You move quietly. That'll help you down there.
expositionTurnInText: You found it. I can't believe it. After all this time.
conflict1Text: There's a complication. {enemy_type_plural} have moved into the caves since the theft. Kill {gather_count} of them so the path stays clear.
conflict1TurnInText: Good. No one else will lose their belongings to those things.
conflict2Text: One more thing. Collect {gather_count} {quest_item} for me. I need to repair the damage they did to the heirloom's case.
conflict2TurnInText: Perfect. The case is restored. It looks almost new.
resolutionText: My family's legacy is whole again, thanks to you. I won't forget this kindness.
